name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
New arrival: 2020 IT BAG. A must-have that conquered the fashion world before it even launched. Inspired by the Paris street name Rue De Solferino! The bag features imported Italian fine pin-stripe Box calfskin with excellent texture and flexibility. The interior features a three-panel accordion pocket for daily essentials. The newly designed "L" letter clasp opens vertically, completely redefining your perception of bag clasps. It's simply too fun!
Model: 2020
Size: 19x13x5cm
